title: Phase 4 warehouse integration
content: The dashboard now reads warehouse views and standardized experiment logs instead of scattered module outputs.
recommendations: Treat warehouse.duckdb and the multimodal feature table as the only authoritative dashboard sources.
Keep adding new modal layers through cleaned.* views so the frontend never needs raw path knowledge again.

title: Signal backbone
content: The model-ready signal slice spans 1507 hours and peaks at 2025-03-14T17:00:00 with 4,042 signals.
recommendations: Use the signal layer as the first place to inspect target drift or regime shifts.
Keep time filtering explicit in experiment configs so dashboard and training stay aligned.

title: Video alignment status
content: The aligned video table covers 9 hours and 7 grids, but overlap with the model-ready signal slice is still weak.
recommendations: Use the video layer for movement evidence and qualitative checking, not yet as a decisive training advantage.
Prioritize future data collection that overlaps the signal window before making stronger multimodal claims.

title: Social warehouse layer
content: The social table provides 345 aligned days through a region-broadcast strategy, which is useful for context but still spatially coarse.
recommendations: Keep the current broadcast layer for broad narrative context.
Upgrade to POI-level matching when better location precision is available.

title: Forecast baseline
content: The accepted standardized run is Hybrid baseline with test MAE 5.99 and test WAPE 70.59%.
recommendations: Use this run as the benchmark for all later seq_len, ablation, or architecture experiments.
When adding new variants, log them through the same experiment bundle so the dashboard can compare them automatically.

title: Road context
content: Static road features are complete for all warehouse rows, and the mean subway distance across grids is 639.6 m.
recommendations: Use road features as interpretable context whenever temporal modalities are sparse.
Surface these features alongside hotspot cells when explaining model behavior to stakeholders.
